text:
(In reply to Ruslan Makhmatkhanov from comment #1)
> Hello Nathan, 
> 
> you should actually just update the affected ports (with bumping of
> PORTREVISION) along with the main change patch. No need to create separate
> PR's for every affected port. Anyway, approved after 230115 is landed. Thank
> you!

Oh, thought it was "correct" to create PRs for them :\ instead of adding them to main PR :)
